text: Hello and welcome to Real Easy English, the podcast where
zh: 大家好,欢迎收听《Real Easy English》播客,在这里

text: we have real conversations in easy English to help you learn. I'm Neil. And I'm Georgie.
zh: 我们用简单的英语进行真实对话,帮助你学习英语。我是Neil。我是Georgie。

text: You can now watch this podcast and find a worksheet to help you learn on our website bbclearningenglish .com.
zh: 你现在可以在我们的网站bbclearningenglish.com上观看这个播客,并找到帮助你学习的练习表。

text: So Georgie, how are you? I'm very tired actually.
zh: 那么Georgie,你好吗?其实我挺累的。

text: I've had a lot of social plans lately. How about you? Yeah, I'm fine.
zh: 我最近有很多社交活动。你呢?我挺好的。

text: Social plans, that's interesting, because we're talking about friends today.
zh: 社交活动,这很有意思,因为我们今天要聊的正是朋友这个话题。

text: Yes, we're talking about socialising, which means spending time with people for fun.
zh: 是的,我们要聊聊socialising,也就是和别人一起消遣、共度时光的意思。

text: So, Neil, do you like spending time with friends? Yeah, I love spending time with my friends.
zh: 那Neil,你喜欢和朋友一起相处吗?是的,我很喜欢和朋友待在一起。

text: If I don't see my friends very Often I feel a bit sad and lonely.
zh: 如果我不常见到朋友,会觉得有点难过和孤独。

text: So yeah, I really like seeing my friends, but I don't get to see them very often
zh: 所以,我真的很喜欢见朋友,但我并不能经常见到他们,

text: because, you know, we're grown -ups and we have responsibilities.
zh: 因为,你知道的,我们都是成年人了,有各自的责任。

text: You have kids, you have lots of things going on. I also like spending time with my friends. I have lots of friends.
zh: 你有孩子,事情也很多。我也喜欢和朋友一起消磨时间。我有很多朋友。

text: As I said, I've had a lot of social plans lately. Pretty much every day I've been socialising.
zh: 就像我说的,我最近社交活动特别多。几乎每天都在社交。

text: Wow. So you like socialising,
zh: 哇。所以你喜欢社交,

text: but do you like things like parties or do you prefer smaller social events?
zh: 但你喜欢派对这种场合,还是更喜欢小型的社交活动?

text: I do really like big parties because I like meeting new people.
zh: 我确实很喜欢大型派对,因为我喜欢认识新朋友。

text: I like dancing as well. So at big parties, usually there's some music.
zh: 我也喜欢跳舞。所以大型派对通常都会有音乐。

text: But I do have a shy side of my personality.
zh: 不过我性格里也有害羞的一面。

text: So usually a smaller event is better for me so I can have kind of deeper conversations with fewer people.
zh: 所以通常小型活动更适合我,这样我可以和更少的人进行更深入的交流。

text: How about you? Yeah, I don't really like
zh: 你呢?嗯,我其实不太喜欢

text: that situation where you're at a party and don't know lots of people.
zh: 那种在派对上,周围很多人你都不认识的情况。

text: So a small group of people that I mainly know and there's one or two people who I don't know. know so well, that's fine.
zh: 如果是一小群我大多都认识的人,再加上一两个不太熟的人,那还好。

text: But a bigger group with lots of people I don't know, I really don't like that.
zh: 但如果是一大群我几乎都不认识的人,我真的很不喜欢那样。

text: And why is that? Is that because you don't like small
zh: 那是为什么呢?是因为你不喜欢闲聊

text: talk? Yeah, I don't really like small talk.
zh: 吗?对,我确实不太喜欢闲聊。

text: It feels a bit empty. Small talk is conversations about things that aren't important,
zh: 这让人觉得有点空洞。闲聊就是聊一些不重要的事情,

text: like the weather, usually with people that you don't know very well.
zh: 比如天气之类的,通常是和你不太熟的人聊。

text: Yeah. And you don't like that? No, I find it awkward. So, Georgie, you like meeting new people.
zh: 是啊。你不喜欢那样?对,我觉得挺尴尬的。那Georgie,你喜欢认识新朋友。

text: Do you feel embarrassed at all or are you completely fine with that?
zh: 你会觉得不好意思吗,还是完全没问题?

text: Oh, I think it depends. I think if you find a topic quite quickly that you have in common,
zh: 嗯,我觉得要看情况。如果能很快找到彼此的共同话题,

text: that avoids embarrassment. But it's when you meet someone new, you don't know them very well
zh: 那就能避免尴尬。但如果是刚认识的人,你确实还不太了解对方,

text: obviously because they're new and you don't know what they like or don't like or what they think is rude or not rude
zh: 因为毕竟是新认识的,你不知道他们喜欢什么、不喜欢什么,也不知道什么在他们看来是无礼的、什么不是,

text: um but if you can figure that out quite quickly it's yeah it's usually okay
zh: 不过如果能很快搞清楚这些,通常就没什么问题了。

text: do you usually feel quite embarrassed then sometimes like you said it depends
zh: 那你通常会觉得挺尴尬的吗?嗯,有时候吧,就像你说的,这要看情况。

text: if you find something that you have in common and you can talk about that sometimes you don't
zh: 如果你找到共同点,就能围绕这个聊下去;但有时候

text: find something in common and then it's really, I don't know, embarrassing I suppose. Ooh, I feel strange just thinking about
zh: 找不到共同点,那就真的,怎么说呢,挺尴尬的。哎呀,光是想想就觉得别扭。

text: it. You obviously, you like parties, you like socialising, but do you like spending time alone?
zh: 你显然喜欢派对,喜欢社交,但你喜欢一个人独处吗?

text: I get more energy from spending time alone and relaxing and not talking to anyone.
zh: 我一个人待着、放松、不跟任何人说话的时候,反而更有精力。

text: I often get what I call social burnout, which means you just get exhausted from spending too much time with others.
zh: 我常常会有一种我称之为“社交倦怠”的感觉,也就是因为和别人相处太久而感到筋疲力尽。

text: How about you? Well, yeah, spending time alone is also important
zh: 你呢?嗯,一个人独处的时间也很重要,

text: and I like to do that but not so much,
zh: 我也喜欢这样,但没有那么多,

text: not as much as maybe spending time with people because like I said before
zh: 没有和朋友相处的时间那么多,因为就像我之前说的,

text: if I'm alone for too long I get a bit lonely and feel a bit, I don't know, just lacking energy.
zh: 如果一个人待太久,我会觉得有点孤单,感觉,怎么说呢,就是没什么精神。

text: Let's recap the vocabulary we heard in this podcast, starting with socialise,
zh: 让我们来回顾一下这期播客中出现的词汇,先从socialise开始,

text: which means to spend time with friends or other people to enjoy yourself.
zh: 意思是和朋友或其他人一起共度时光、寻找乐趣。

text: We had small talk, which is conversation about things which aren't important, such as the weather or the traffic.
zh: 我们还讲到了small talk,指的是那些不重要话题的对话,比如天气或交通状况。

text: We use small talk a lot in the UK. We heard some adjectives to describe how you might feel about meeting new people.
zh: 在英国,我们经常用到小闲聊。我们还听到了一些形容词,用来描述你对认识新朋友的感受。

text: So we had embarrassed, which means feeling ashamed or shy.
zh: 比如embarrassed,意思是感到害臊或害羞。

text: And we also heard awkward, which means feeling uncomfortable when you're meeting new people. We also heard in common.
zh: 我们还听到了awkward,意思是在认识新朋友时感到不自在。我们还听到了in common这个说法。

text: So if you have something in common with someone, it means you share the same likes, dislikes or interests with
zh: 如果你和某人有共同点(in common),意思是你们有相同的喜好、厌恶或兴趣。

text: someone. That's it for this episode of Real Easy English.
zh: 这就是本期《Real Easy English》的全部内容。

text: Test what you've learned by downloading the free worksheet on our website bbclearningenglish .com. See you then! Bye!
zh: 通过下载我们网站bbclearningenglish.com上的免费练习表,来检验一下你学到了什么吧。我们下期再见!拜拜!
